claim_boundary: Diagnostic-only analysis of one scenario/seed/horizon; not benchmark-strength mitigation evidence.
regenerated_trace_storage: raw trace regenerated locally under ignored output; compact tracked evidence is this summary plus manifest.md
interpretation: Topology alternatives were present on 90 of 160 steps, so the strongest absence-only explanation is contradicted for this slice.
Primary route dominance is mostly explained by route length: primary_route was shorter than or tied with the best alternative on 88 of 90 ok steps.
Topology-command wins inherited the selected hypothesis and therefore did not create corrective rerouting; all 33 selected primary_route.
The current compact trace does not preserve enough per-hypothesis selection-score detail to fully explain the single ok command-win step where a masked alternative had a shorter remaining route.
recommendation: Revise or instrument topology hypothesis generation/selection before retuning downstream scoring; keep topology_guided_hybrid_rule_v0 diagnostic-only until a non-primary hypothesis can win under a predeclared proof.
